_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collect intrusion artifacts (e.g., source code, malware, trojans) and use discovered data to enable mitigation of potential cyber defense incidents within the enterprise.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.559), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.553).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.9/10 (raw 0.293). Shared vocabulary: [data, enterprise]. DCWF-only terms [artifacts, code, collect, cyber, defense, discovered] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, develop, llm, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.856 (P=0.856, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.6%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Collect intrusion artifacts (e.g., source code, malware, trojans) and use discov" and "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.560 > STS 0.293 (gap +0.268). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, enterprise] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [data, enterprise]. DCWF-only: [artifacts, code, collect, cyber, defense, discovered]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, controls, develop, llm, maintain].
